data.title: AML Bitcoin creator convicted of wire fraud, money laundering
data.description:
The founder of a cryptocurrency exchange whose namesake was tied to Anti-Money Laundering (AML) was found guilty of wire fraud and money laundering in a California court.In a March 12 trial in the US District Court for the Northern District of California, a jury found AML Bitcoin creator Rowland Marcus Andrade guilty of two felony counts as part of a scheme to defraud investors. Authorities...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/aml-bitcoin-founder-wire-fraud-money-laundering?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto Trader Says Bitcoin Could Go Much Lower if Vital Support Level Crumbles, Maps Path Forward for Aptos
data.description:

In a new post, pseudonymous crypto trader Altcoin Sherpa tells his 244,000 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin may revisit the $60,000 range if BTC loses $78,000 as support. data.title: Bitcoin decouples from gold as the precious metal trades at new all-time highs
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) decoupled from gold and behaved more like a tech stock again. Gold reached a total valuation above $20T, climbing close to the $3,000 per ounce level.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-decouples-from-gold-as-the-precious-metal-trades-at-new-all-time-highs/

data.title: Ripple Secures DFSA License in the UAE
data.description:
Ripple has secured a major license in the Middle East after getting regulatory nod from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA). The license allows Ripple to offer regulated crypto payments and services within the Dubai International Finance Centre (DIFC). Ripple announced on March 13, 2025 that it had secured a major license in the Middle […]

source: https://coinjournal.net/news/ripple-secures-dfsa-license-in-the-uae/

data.description:
